headline: LKQ Corporation Announces Results for First Quarter 2026
summary: Board of Directors Initiated a Comprehensive Review of Strategic Alternatives to Enhance Shareholder Value Maintains Focus on Returning Capital to Shareholders with $77 million in Cash Dividends to Shareholders Dividend of $0.30 Per Share Approved to be Paid in Second Quarter of 2026 ANTIOCH, Tenn., April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LKQ Corporation (Nasdaq: LKQ) today reported first quarter 2026 financial results. “We are operating in a challenging environment and are focused on improving our r
